Notes: 2006 Food Lion SAC women's basketball tournament, quarter-finals
LMU Coach Roger Vannoy ends his 25 year career at LMU with a
463-246 record at LMU.  He is the winningest coach in LMU history
Game.Officials: Rusty Helms,  Lori Jones,  Bonnie Pettus
